title: Wolf Peak: The Case of Ruth Choi
short_description: A true-crime-style deduction game: in 1991 Ruth Choi was murdered, with six suspects and no solved case—watch evidence, find the killer, and the game only reveals the truth if you convict the right person.
description: In 1991 Ruth Choi was murdered, it was whittled down to 6 suspects, but the case was never solved. Watch interviews, go through evidence and build your case. A game where you are never told who the killer is, unless you convict them. Use your own deductive skills to find out, who killed Ruth Choi.

news.title: Coming Soon: Wolf Peak: The Case of Ruth Choi
